% ============================================================================
%  CV — Ariel Ortiz-Bobea
%
%  This file holds the layout (preamble, page geometry, fonts, section
%  macros, page furniture). Content lives in cv-body.tex, which is
%  AUTO-GENERATED by build_cv.R from _data/*.yml. Do not edit cv-body.tex
%  by hand — your changes will be overwritten on the next build.
%
%  To rebuild:  Rscript cv/build_cv.R
% ============================================================================

\documentclass[11pt]{article}

\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{ebgaramond}               % free Garamond revival (matches Blevins's Garamond Premier Pro)
\usepackage[margin=1in,top=0.9in,bottom=0.9in]{geometry}
\usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{lastpage}                 % for "page X of N" in the footer

% ----- Paragraph & list defaults -----
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{0.35em}

% Suppress bullets on itemize (Blevins-style indented list) but keep them
% on enumerate for numbered things like Working Papers and Book Chapters.
\setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=1.5em,label={},itemsep=0.25em,parsep=0pt,topsep=0.2em}
\setlist[itemize,2]{leftmargin=1.5em,label={}}
\setlist[enumerate]{leftmargin=2em,labelsep=0.5em,itemsep=0.25em,parsep=0pt,topsep=0.2em}

% ----- Section macro: plain UPPERCASE, no rule (Blevins style) -----
\newcommand{\cvsection}[1]{%
  \par\vspace{1.0em}%
  \noindent\uppercase{#1}\par
  \vspace{0.3em}%
}

% ----- Sub-heading inside sections (e.g. service kinds, talk years) -----
\newcommand{\cvsubsection}[1]{%
  \par\vspace{0.3em}%
  \noindent\textit{#1}\par
}

% ----- Page furniture: "page X of N" bottom-center -----
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
\fancyfoot[C]{\small\thepage{} of \pageref*{LastPage}}

\begin{document}

\input{cv-body.tex}

\end{document}
